subject: Q2 Purchase Orders Confirmed — SKU-A and SKU-B
body: Dear YamaTech Sales Team, please find our confirmed Q2 purchase orders. ORD-A01: 300 units of SKU-A (Premium Control Module) and ORD-A02: 150 units of SKU-B (Standard Control Module). Both are due by May 15th. We have ample lead time and no expedite premium is required. Please confirm receipt and provide a production schedule at your earliest convenience.

subject: Pilot Deployment Orders — SKU-C and SKU-D
body: Hi YamaTech team, we are launching our nationwide factory automation pilot. ORD-A03: 200 units of SKU-C (Industrial Sensor Pack) and ORD-A04: 80 units of SKU-D (Compact Drive Unit). Delivery required by May 20th. Quality assurance certificates will be required with each delivery batch. We look forward to a smooth partnership.

subject: Microcontroller V2 Pricing and Availability — April 2026
body: Dear YamaTech Procurement, this is our monthly availability update. Microcontroller V2 (RAW-001): 2000 units in stock. Standard 14-day delivery: $15.50/unit. Expedited 6-day air freight: $16.50/unit. Minimum order: 200 units. We also have Tempered Glass Panel (RAW-004) available at $22.00/unit with a 12-day lead time. Please let us know if you would like a formal quote.
